subject: A massive earth giant / colossus with rocky brown skin, enormous muscular build, and decorative blue beaded accessories around the torso — the summon Titan from Final Fantasy XI
description: A towering rocky colossus fills the frame from below, its bulk dominating the composition. The figure has dark brown, textured stone-like skin with a broad muscular torso. Blue beaded or braided decorative accessories hang across the chest and arms. The face is partially visible — heavy-browed and massive. The background is a warm amber-gold glow filtering through rocky terrain, suggesting a subterranean or earthen environment. The image is rendered in FFXI's photorealistic 3D style. Card type is 'Summon' from FFXI. Titan is a recurring earth-element summon across the Final Fantasy franchise.
foreground: Massive stone colossus torso and face, blue beaded accessories visible
background: Amber-gold rocky terrain, warm underground glow
emotion: imposing, dominant — looming presence from below
